name: Acute appendicitis with migrating pain

patient.free_text: Pain started periumbilical 18 hours ago, now localized to right lower quadrant. Rebound tenderness at McBurney's point.

source: Surgical textbook presentation of classic appendicitis
notes: Periumbilical-to-RLQ migration is pathognomonic. Rebound tenderness + leukocytosis + fever seal it.
